qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_categoria, P.c_convenio, P.d_convenio, T.c_categoria, T.d_categoria FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as P, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as T JOIN P.oi_convenio INNER T.oi_convenio WHERE T.oi_categoria IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' maxsize 1001 SELECT T.oi_categoria, P.c_convenio, P.d_convenio, T.c_categoria, T.d_categoria FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS as P, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as T JOIN P.oi_convenio INNER T.oi_convenio {%?(#SOURCE:@search1!='') {% WHERE contain(ucase(P.c_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search1)}) or contain(ucase(P.d_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search1)}) OR contain(ucase(T.c_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search1)}) or contain(ucase(T.d_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search1)}) %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@search2!='') {% OR contain(ucase(P.c_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search2)}) or contain(ucase(P.d_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search2)}) OR contain(ucase(T.c_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search2)}) or contain(ucase(T.d_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search2)}) %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@search3!='') {% OR contain(ucase(P.c_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search3)}) or contain(ucase(P.d_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search3)}) OR contain(ucase(T.c_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search3)}) or contain(ucase(T.d_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search3)}) %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@search4!='') {% OR contain(ucase(P.c_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search4)}) or contain(ucase(P.d_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search4)}) OR contain(ucase(T.c_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search4)}) or contain(ucase(T.d_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search4)}) %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@search5!='') {% OR contain(ucase(P.c_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search5)}) or contain(ucase(P.d_convenio), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search5)}) OR contain(ucase(T.c_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search5)}) or contain(ucase(T.d_categoria), {upper-case(#SOURCE:@search5)}) %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW
